title: Labels/Phase2 spike: live-OBS CEF measurement -> set LABEL_SHUTDOWN_WHEN_HIDDEN + confirm LABEL_FPS (needs live OBS)
description: The Phase 2 measurement deferred for lack of live OBS. Measure CEF process/RAM count and switch-in latency for shutdown true vs false across a populated 1/2/4-Screen against the perf budget (<=~150MB/label, <=~2GB total, <=1 transition switch-in). Set LABEL_SHUTDOWN_WHEN_HIDDEN to the winner; confirm/retune the provisional LABEL_FPS=15. Also do the live-only AC#3 no-crash teardown check (the mock e2e cannot cover it). Escalate to Option B (full-canvas overlay) only if neither posture meets budget at fleet scale.
acceptance_criteria: shutdown posture chosen by measurement and recorded; LABEL_FPS confirmed; live add/switch/delete shows no OBS crash and meets the budget

title: FOUND-6/P2a: Windows supervisor CI smoke - build+boot the .exe the host ships (O-C1)
description: The #1 review finding and highest-value item in the whole review. Add a Windows CI job that builds AND boots the supervisor .exe (binary:build:win) the host actually ships. Build-half has no FOUND-4 dependency.
acceptance_criteria: CI builds and boots the Windows .exe; job is blocking; a broken build fails CI

title: FOUND-6/P1: Tailwind v4 CSS-first migration + delete 4 inert config files (F-H1)
description: The one finding most likely mis-rendering today. Migrate to Tailwind v4 CSS-first; delete the 4 inert/contradictory configs (tailwind.config.js, tailwind.config.ts, postcss.config.js, postcss.config.mjs). Adding @plugin '@tailwindcss/forms' activates a never-applied form reset - MUST be browser-verified.
acceptance_criteria: single CSS-first Tailwind config; 4 stale files deleted; pages browser-verified to render identically (form reset change reviewed)

title: FOUND-4/P7: supervisor fail-loud schema preflight (assertSchemaPresent)
description: Add assertSchemaPresent - a plain sqlite_master query at supervisor boot that exits cleanly with a clear message instead of crash-looping on a cold/empty host. Independent of P2 (critique #2).
acceptance_criteria: supervisor exits with a clear schema-missing message on an empty DB instead of crash-looping

title: FOUND-4/P4: add indexes incl. UNIQUE on obs_source_name (+ pre-existing-duplicate detector)
description: Add the missing indexes including a UNIQUE index on obs_source_name (enforces the dedup invariant). Run a pre-existing-duplicate detector BEFORE creating the UNIQUE index so a dirty DB fails loud, not mid-migration.
acceptance_criteria: UNIQUE obs_source_name index created; duplicate detector runs first and reports clearly; supporting indexes added

title: FOUND-4/P2: lib/dbSchema.ts (pure DDL/PRAGMA strings, no driver imports)
description: Data-layer keystone: extract pure DDL/PRAGMA strings to lib/dbSchema.ts with NO driver imports, so both the web (sqlite) and supervisor runtimes consume the same source of truth.
acceptance_criteria: lib/dbSchema.ts has no driver imports; both openers consume it; schema identical to today

title: FOUND-4/P3: apply canonical PRAGMA (synchronous=NORMAL + wal_autocheckpoint) to both openers (S-F2/P-M3)
description: Apply the canonical PRAGMA set to both DB openers from the dbSchema keystone.
acceptance_criteria: both openers set synchronous=NORMAL and wal_autocheckpoint; verified via PRAGMA query in a test

title: FOUND-2/P4: migrate flat mutation routes + S-F3/T-H1 validation + Q-H3 guard + streamlink '--' separator
description: Migrate addStream, setActive, PUT/DELETE streams+teams. Reuse validateStreamInput in PUT /streams/[id] (S-F3/T-H1); add Number.isInteger guard (Q-H3). Also prepend '--' before the streamlink URL positional in scripts/streamlink-supervisor/streamPipeline.ts (argument-injection mitigation, S-F3 dropped half).
acceptance_criteria: routes converged; PUT validates input; integer guard present; streamlink spawn uses '--' before the URL; tests green

title: FOUND-1/P4: make switcher-removal failure fatal before RemoveScene (Q-H5)
description: Real defect: the code swallows the exact switcher-removal error its own comment says crashes OBS. Make that failure fatal BEFORE RemoveScene. Char-test from P3 must exist first.
acceptance_criteria: switcher-removal failure aborts before RemoveScene; covered by a test that asserts no RemoveScene on detach failure

title: FOUND-1/P2: extract OBS connection singleton -> lib/obs/connection.js
description: Move the connection singleton out of obsClient.js into lib/obs/connection.js (re-exported) with a race-guard test. First extraction of the spine.
acceptance_criteria: connection logic lives in lib/obs/connection.js; re-exported so callers unchanged; race-guard test green; full type-check/lint/jest green

title: FOUND-1/P3: teardown char-test first, then move deleteStream/TeamComponents -> lib/obs/teardown.js
description: Write the teardown-ORDER characterization test FIRST (pins switcher-detach-first ordering, the OBS-crash guard), then move deleteStreamComponents/deleteTeamComponents to lib/obs/teardown.js. This is also FOUND-3/P7's gate.
acceptance_criteria: characterization test captures current teardown order before the move; behavior identical after; teardown lives in lib/obs/teardown.js; green

title: FOUND-6: CI/CD, build-config & docs hygiene
description: Tailwind v4 migration, Windows supervisor build+boot CI smoke (#1 review finding O-C1), CI security scans, action SHA-pinning, operator docs refresh. Closes O-C1,O-H1(CI),O-H2,F-H1,F-M5,O-M1-M5,O-L1/L3,D-C2,D-C3,D-H3,D-H4,D-M3,D-M4.

title: FOUND-4: Data layer & two-writer SQLite integrity
description: Shared schema/PRAGMA keystone, indexes/UNIQUE invariant, fail-loud schema preflights for the two-writer (web + supervisor) SQLite host. Closes A-C1,S-F2,O-H1,P-H1,Q-M8,P-M2,P-M3,A-M3,Q-M5,Q-M6,D-C1,T-H2,T-M1. P1 (getDatabase memoization) already merged (b1d2577).

title: FOUND-3: Test backfill of security-critical + untested core
description: Backfill tests for the ~0%-covered security/auth layer and the untested obsClient/API core. Closes T-C1,T-C2,T-C3,T-H1,T-H3,T-H4,T-M1,T-M2,T-M3. P1 middleware.test, P2 security.test, P3 twitch batching tests already merged (03a2669, 5654f36, 50aceef).

title: FOUND-1: obsClient.js extraction, typing & DI (keystone)
description: Decompose the monolithic lib/obsClient.js into typed, DI'd lib/obs/* modules via behavior-preserving, characterization-test-first extractions. Critical-path spine of the roadmap. Closes F-H2,F-H3,A-H2,Q-H2,Q-H5,Q-M1,Q-M2,T-C3,D-M1,P-M1. P1 (typed .d.ts) already merged (commit 34c6884).

title: FOUND-2: API response-envelope convergence + contract
description: Converge ~25 API routes onto one response envelope + a self-proving guard test. Closes Q-H1,A-H1,D-H1,D-H2,F-H4,Q-H3,S-F3,S-F5,S-F6,T-H1. P1 (isDev gating in createErrorResponse) already merged (commit 6253a1a).

title: Labels/SSE: replace polled viewers with the SSE real-time channel (plan 4.3)
description: Viewers currently ship via polling (/api/overlay/[id]/viewers). Implement the planned SSE channel: SSE spike FIRST (verify text/event-stream is unbuffered+uncompressed on the standalone Node server), then /api/overlay/[id]/events with full-state-on-connect + ~15s heartbeat + EventSource poll fallback. Cache keyed by Twitch login so reconnect-on-switch hits cache. Map id->login per connection.
acceptance_criteria: viewers update live via SSE without re-add; full current state on connect; heartbeat present; poll fallback on EventSource error; reconnect hits the login-keyed cache

title: FOUND-6/P5: fill TODO(operator) in RUNBOOK_FALLBACK.md (OWNER fill-in - needs Derek's OBS hotkeys)
description: Fill every TODO(operator) in docs/RUNBOOK_FALLBACK.md. Owner fill-in, NOT agent-invented - needs your real OBS hotkey bindings.
acceptance_criteria: no TODO(operator) markers remain; hotkeys are the real bindings

title: FOUND-6/P2b: no-schema fail-loud CI assertion (depends on FOUND-4/P7+P8)
description: The half of O-C1 that depends on the schema preflight: assert the supervisor exits loud (not crash-loops) on a schema-less DB. Advisory until the preflight lands.
acceptance_criteria: CI asserts clean fail-loud exit on an empty-schema DB

title: FOUND-5/P4: wire existing useSmartPolling into the streams health poll (P-H4/F-M3)
description: Wire the existing useSmartPolling hook into the streams health poll to back off when idle/hidden.
acceptance_criteria: streams health poll uses useSmartPolling; backs off when tab hidden; UI still live when active

title: FOUND-5/P1: invert viewer-cache TTL (25s->45s, server>client) + cache immutable id->login (P-C2/P-M6)
description: Invert the viewer-cache TTL so the server cache outlives the client poll interval, and cache the immutable id->login map. Substantially closes P-C1/P-C2 on its own.
acceptance_criteria: server TTL > client poll interval; id->login cached; measured request rate drops

title: FOUND-4/P8: schema preflight in 'cuesheet doctor' (shares assertSchemaPresent)
description: Wire the shared assertSchemaPresent into the cuesheet doctor command.
acceptance_criteria: cuesheet doctor reports schema presence/absence using the shared assertion

title: FOUND-4/P5: wrap seedLiveTestEvent in a transaction (Q-M6)
description: Wrap seedLiveTestEvent (lib/liveSeed.ts) in a transaction, mirroring cloneEvent. Independent safe filler.
acceptance_criteria: seedLiveTestEvent runs in a single transaction; partial-failure leaves no half-seeded event

title: FOUND-3/P6: addStream rollback + PUT-validation tests (red->green for FOUND-2/P4)
description: Acceptance tests for addStream rollback-on-failure and PUT input validation - red before FOUND-2/P4, green after.
acceptance_criteria: rollback + PUT-validation tests pass against the FOUND-2/P4 changes

title: FOUND-3/P4: db-init race acceptance test (red->green vs FOUND-4/P1)
description: Add the acceptance test that was red before getDatabase() memoization and green after, pinning the check-then-await race fix.
acceptance_criteria: test reproduces the race against an un-memoized opener and passes against the memoized one

title: FOUND-3/P5: OBS mutating-route test suites
description: Add suites for the OBS mutating routes (mock OBS client per lib/__tests__/obsClient.test.js).
acceptance_criteria: mutating routes covered with mocked OBS; green

title: FOUND-2/P5: migrate client-coupled bare-JSON read routes (server+client together)
description: Migrate GET streams/[id], obsStatus, getCurrentScene - server + client edits together, heaviest browser verification (these feed the UI).
acceptance_criteria: routes + their UI consumers updated together; browser-verified; guard green

title: FOUND-2/P3: migrate 6 zero-client-coupling write routes to the envelope
description: Migrate createGroup, syncGroups, verifyGroups, setScene, triggerTransition, obsPlaybackSettings (no client coupling) onto the converged response envelope.
acceptance_criteria: all 6 routes emit the converged envelope; guard test green

title: FOUND-1/P8: convert lib/obs/* to .ts; make obsClient a typed barrel (rest of F-H2)
description: Convert the extracted lib/obs/* modules to TypeScript and make obsClient a typed barrel export.
acceptance_criteria: lib/obs/* is .ts; obsClient is a typed barrel; type-check:bun + type-check:deck green

title: FOUND-2/P2: responseEnvelopeGuard test (clone tableNameHardcodeGuard.test.ts)
description: Add the response-shape guard test, cloned from tableNameHardcodeGuard.test.ts, that fails if a route emits an off-contract envelope. Self-proving completion check for the convergence.
acceptance_criteria: guard test exists and fails on a deliberately off-contract route; passes on the converged routes

title: FOUND-1/P6: fix createTextSource create-vs-update divergence (D-M1) + delete dead createStreamGroup V1
description: Resolve the confirmed createTextSource create-vs-update divergence, then delete the ~317-line dead createStreamGroup V1 (re-run the no-caller grep at merge to confirm dead).
acceptance_criteria: create/update paths consistent; V1 createStreamGroup deleted after grep confirms zero callers; green

title: FOUND-1/P7: extract createStreamGroupV2 (live create path - riskiest PR) + hoist GetInputList (P-M1)
description: Extract createStreamGroupV2 (the live create path) into lib/obs/* - single riskiest PR, keep isolated. Hoist GetInputList out of the per-source loop.
acceptance_criteria: createStreamGroupV2 extracted behind char-tests; live create path behavior identical; GetInputList hoisted; green

title: FOUND-1/P5: kind-fallback color-source loop + extract lib/obs/textSource.js (Q-H2/Q-M1)
description: Rebuild the nested-catch color_source ladder into the proven kind-fallback loop, tame bare catches, and extract lib/obs/textSource.js.
acceptance_criteria: color-source creation uses the kind-fallback loop; no bare swallow; textSource extracted; green

title: HTML stream labels: remaining follow-ups
description: PR #38 + follow-ups shipped Phases 0a-4 (route groups, overlay page/API, branding, Phase 2 OBS code, polled viewers, role chip, observability, docs). Remaining: SSE upgrade, the live-OBS Phase 2 measurement spike, and the ADR follow-ups. Plan: .omc/plans/html-stream-labels.md.

title: FOUND-5: Performance & frontend modernization
description: Cut viewer-poll cost and user-visible render cost; adopt React 19 patterns. Closes P-C1,P-C2,P-H2,P-L3,P-H4,F-M3,P-M4,Q-M7,F-M1,F-M2,P-M6,P-M1. P3 (delete addStream disconnectFromOBS calls) already merged (587f137).

title: Labels/follow-up: team logo upload endpoint + UI (replaces manual drop)
description: Phase 1 shipped manual logo drop into public/logos/ + path entry. Add an upload endpoint and /teams UI so operators upload logos instead of dropping files.
acceptance_criteria: operator can upload a team logo via the UI; it lands in public/logos/ and the overlay shows it

title: Labels/follow-up: sheet-sourced branding in importFromSheet
description: Extend scripts/importFromSheet.ts to read team branding (colors/logo) IF/when those columns appear in the signup sheet; until then branding stays manual via /teams.
acceptance_criteria: when branding columns exist in the sheet, import populates color_*/logo_path; absent columns leave branding untouched

title: Labels/follow-up: score data source (manual-entry UI or external feed)
description: No score source exists; the overlay contract keeps score:null static and unstreamed. Add a pluggable source - a manual-entry UI or a future external feed - and stream it once real.
acceptance_criteria: score can be set from a real source and renders; absent source still renders score-less (never fabricated)

title: Labels/follow-up: exit animation via 'leaving' SSE signal (requires shutdown:false)
description: True exit animation is impossible under shutdown:true (source cut on switch-away). If the L2 spike selects shutdown:false, add a 'leaving' SSE signal to play an exit animation. Out of v1 scope; gated on L2's posture decision.
acceptance_criteria: exit animation plays on switch-away when shutdown:false; no-op/skipped under shutdown:true

title: FOUND-6/P6: SHA-pin third-party actions + add timeouts/concurrency/permissions + clean ~700MB *.bun-build litter
description: SHA-pin third-party GitHub Actions; add timeouts, concurrency groups, and least-privilege permissions to workflows; clean the ~700 MB *.bun-build litter.
acceptance_criteria: third-party actions SHA-pinned; workflows have timeouts/concurrency/permissions; bun-build litter removed/ignored

title: FOUND-6/P3: advisory npm audit + secret scan into ci-ok
description: Add advisory npm audit and a secret scan as needs: of the ci-ok aggregate gate (extend ci-ok's needs, never edit the ruleset).
acceptance_criteria: npm audit + secret scan run in CI as advisory under ci-ok

title: FOUND-6/P4: operator docs refresh (OBS_SETUP rewrite, env/security reference, version strings, changelog)
description: Refresh operator docs: rewrite OBS_SETUP, add an env/security-posture reference, fix version strings, add a changelog.
acceptance_criteria: OBS_SETUP rewritten; env/security reference exists; versions/changelog current

title: FOUND-5/P6: adopt useActionState/useOptimistic forms (React 19, F-M1)
description: Adopt React 19 useActionState/useOptimistic in the forms.
acceptance_criteria: forms use useActionState/useOptimistic; optimistic UI verified in-browser

title: FOUND-5/P7: memoized <TeamRow> (F-M2)
description: Extract a memoized <TeamRow> component, mirroring <StreamRow>.
acceptance_criteria: <TeamRow> memoized; teams page render cost reduced

title: FOUND-5/P5: extract memoized <StreamRow> + useStreamControls hook (P-M4/Q-M7)
description: Extract a memoized <StreamRow> component and a useStreamControls hook to cut re-render cost on the streams page.
acceptance_criteria: <StreamRow> memoized; control logic in useStreamControls; render profiling improves

title: FOUND-5/P2: getViewerCounts coalescer (profile-gated; ?ids= endpoint DROPPED)
description: Add ONLY the getViewerCounts coalescer, and ONLY if profiling after P1 shows a real first-poll thundering-herd. The ?ids= batch endpoint is explicitly cut (no consumer; ~1.1 req/s at <=50 streams).
acceptance_criteria: coalescer added only if profiling justifies it; no ?ids= endpoint shipped

title: FOUND-4/P10: document the two-writer/boot-order invariant (+ optional WAL checkpoint if growth observed)
description: Document the two-writer (web + supervisor) and boot-order invariant. Add a periodic WAL-checkpoint timer ONLY if WAL growth is actually observed on a multi-day host.
acceptance_criteria: invariant documented; WAL timer deferred unless growth observed

title: FOUND-3/P8: one Playwright overlay-render smoke (T-M2)
description: The single Playwright smoke for /overlay/... render - the only place jsdom is structurally insufficient. Advisory until two green main runs, then promote. Keep out of the jest path.
acceptance_criteria: Playwright overlay smoke runs in CI as advisory; documented promotion criteria

title: FOUND-3/P9: scoped per-path coverage ratchet on security.ts/middleware.ts
description: Add a scoped coverage ratchet on security.ts and middleware.ts only. Do NOT touch the deliberately-inert global 70% gate.
acceptance_criteria: per-path ratchet enforced for the two files; global gate untouched

title: FOUND-3/P7: consolidate obsClient DI characterization coverage (T-C3)
description: Thin consolidation over the char-tests authored in FOUND-1/P2-P3 - NOT a re-authoring. Don't double-count effort.
acceptance_criteria: DI characterization coverage consolidated; no duplicate test logic

title: FOUND-2/P7: rewrite docs/API.md to the converged reality (D-H1/D-H2)
description: Rewrite docs/API.md to match the converged envelope and route inventory.
acceptance_criteria: docs/API.md reflects the converged contract and current routes

title: FOUND-2/P6: bless deliberate exceptions (overlay/supervisor/preview), freeze guard allowlist
description: Document the deliberate non-enveloped exceptions (overlay, supervisor break-glass - Option A: document the shape, do NOT rewrap; preview) and freeze the guard allowlist. Empty TODO allowlist is the track's completion proof.
acceptance_criteria: exceptions documented; guard allowlist frozen with no open TODO entries

title: FOUND-6/P7: demote .forgejo to an advisory mirror (header comment + upload-artifact v3->v4)
description: Demote .forgejo to an advisory mirror rather than chasing parity (self-hosted Bun constraint = high effort, low value): add a header comment marking it advisory and bump upload-artifact v3->v4.
acceptance_criteria: .forgejo marked advisory in a header comment; upload-artifact on v4

title: FOUND-4/P9: repository layer (A-M3) - DEMOTED to backlog
description: Largest data item, weakest value for a solo single-host tool; competes for the same route files as FOUND-1/FOUND-2; nothing depends on it. Do ONLY if it stops actively helping to not do it.
acceptance_criteria: (backlog) only pursued if a concrete need emerges
